title: Perez Hilton points to deeper struggle after Clavicular shares bloodied face following overdose livestream incident
summary_full: Braden Peters, known as Clavicular, posted a bloodied photo after a suspected overdose during a livestream. Perez Hilton reacted, saying things “spiraled fast,” as reported on his website. According to People magazine, the incident unfolded live before he was hospitalized. Peters later admitted substance use was a coping method and said he plans to stop for now.
